name: Airtable Table
description: An Airtable table is a collection of records organized with a defined set of fields and views within a base. Tables define the structure and schema of the data they contain.

id.description: The unique identifier for the table. Table IDs always start with the 'tbl' prefix.

name.description: The display name of the table.

description.description: An optional description of the table's purpose and contents.

primaryFieldId.description: The ID of the primary field for this table. The primary field serves as the main identifier for records.

fields.description: The field definitions (columns) in the table.

views.description: The view definitions in the table.
